Article Title: Brooks Koepka: What is Brooks Koepka's net worth in 2026? Career, earnings, LIV Golf contract and PGA Tour comeback story
Article Text:
What is Brooks Koepka's net worth in 2026? Career, earnings, LIV Golf contract and PGA Tour comeback story (Image Via Getty Images)

Brooks Koepka's net worth and earnings

Brooks Koepka's major wins and golf career highlights

Brooks Koepka's move to LIV Golf and return to the PGA Tour

Brooks Koepka's personal life and early journey

Brooks Koepka is one of the most successful golfers of his generation. He is known for winning big tournaments and staying calm under pressure. Over the years, he has earned money from golf, brand deals, and league contracts. With his recent return to the PGA Tour, fans are once again talking about his net worth, career journey, and latest updates.According to Celebrity Net Worth, Brooks Koepka has a net worth of approximately $60 million. Throughout his PGA Tour career, he earned approximately $50 million in prize money. He generated significant income through his endorsement contracts with major companies. The 2022 deal brought him to LIV Golf, with a reported contract worth nearly $100 million. The deal brought him substantial financial benefits because it increased his overall earnings.Koepka emerged as a top player by winning the U.S. Open both in 2017 and 2018. He then won the PGA Championship in 2018, 2019, and again in 2023.These wins made him a five-time major champion. He also reached World No. 1 in the Official World Golf Ranking and held that position for 47 weeks.Although he had moved to LIV Golf, he was still maintaining a great performance.In 2023, he won the PGA Championship, marking the first LIV Golf player to win a major.In 2022, Koepka joined LIV Golf, a new league backed by Saudi Arabia. At that time, players who joined LIV were not allowed to play on the PGA Tour.In late 2025, he decided to leave LIV Golf and applied to return to the PGA Tour. In January 2026, his return was approved under a new rule called the “Returning Member Program.”As part of this, he agreed to financial penalties, including a reported $5 million charity payment and loss of some bonus benefits. He is expected to play again in PGA Tour events starting in 2026.Brooks Koepka was born on May 3, 1990, in Florida. He played college golf at Florida State University before turning professional in 2012. In his personal life, he got married to Jena Sims in the year 2022, and they have a son named Crew.
Article Summary: Brooks Koepka is one of the most successful golfers of his generation. He is known for winning big tournaments and staying calm under pressure. Over the years, he has earned money from golf, brand deals, and league contracts. In 2022, he joined LIV Golf, a new league backed by Saudi Arabia. In late 2025, he decided to leave LIV and applied to return to the PGA Tour.

Article Title: Will Levis' ex Gia Duddy has something to say to WAGs at the 2026 NFL Draft
Article Text:
Gia Duddy (Instagram)

What is Gia Duddy's advice for WAGs ahead of NFL Draft?

Gia Duddy knows exactly what it's like to be the girlfriend sitting in that room when the cameras are hunting for a reaction. She was there in Kansas City in 2023, watching Will Levis wait through round one, then slip into round two as the 33rd pick to the Tennessee Titans. The moment went viral, but not for the reasons most people expect from an NFL Draft story. Duddy's expressions were everywhere. And now, with the 2026 Draft approaching, she has something to say about it.Gia Duddy has stayed mostly quiet about that night, even as her social media following grew rapidly in its aftermath. But ahead of another draft cycle, she offered a candid reminder that the cameras rarely blink. Her message, shared previously on Instagram, mixes humor with a clear edge of caution.“I know I know what tonight is, but do you guys know what tonight is? It’s the Caudalie event, obviously so let’s get ready,” Duddy said. “I’m just messing with you guys, I know it’s the NFL draft, you guys actually won’t let me forget. But I do actually have an event with Caudalie so I do need to get ready. I feel like I’ve never really talked about the draft, and I don’t really like talking about it, just because it just genuinely wasn’t about me.So I just like never felt the need to speak on it, but I do wanna say is congratulations to all the hard-working men that are in this draft class.“Genuinely so excited for all of you, I know I have some friends in it this year, and for those who are attending, beware of your resting [expletive] face. Because the media loves media, and they will start a story that you’re just a [expletive]. So from one RBF to another, good luck.”What makes her advice valuable is the honesty behind it. As Levis waited longer than expected before the Tennessee Titans selected him at No. 33, every glance and expression from his table became content. Duddy, then a college student at Penn State University, found herself at the center of a narrative she did not shape.That experience has since informed her public presence. While her relationship with Levis, which began in 2021 and ended in 2023, is now part of the past, the lessons from that night have lingered. The draft is still about careers changing in real time, but the ecosystem around it has shifted. Cameras search for reactions as much as selections.Duddy’s advice is simple, but it reflects a broader truth. For partners in the room, the moment is shared, whether they want it or not. And in an era where clips travel faster than context, even a quiet expression can become a headline.
Article Summary: Gia Duddy was there in 2023 when Will Levis was selected by the Tennessee Titans. Duddy has stayed mostly quiet about that night, even as her social media following grew. But ahead of another draft cycle, she offered a reminder that the cameras rarely blink.

Article Title: Hyderabad Techie Arrest: Hyderabad techie loses job, turns to cultivation of ganja; held
Article Text:
A software engineer in Hyderabad was arrested for cultivating ganja plants at his residence after losing his job due to substance addiction.

By Manvi Vyas

HYDERABAD: A software engineer, who allegedly lost his job due to substance addiction, was arrested on Tuesday for growing ganja plants at his house in East Gandhinagar in Nacharam.Excise officials said the accused, Ch Shashidhar, 37, was habituated to ganja and alcohol. Acting on a tip-off, the Ranga Reddy Enforcement ‘A' team conducted a raid at the premises and seized 17 ganja plants. Officials said the plants grew up to three metres and some of them even began flowering. The yield from the plants would be about 10 kg, they said."He started spending most of what he earned to procure the contraband and was eventually terminated from his job. To cater to his personal needs after the loss of employment, he began growing ganja plants on the terrace of his house," an excise official said.Ghatkesar excise sub-inspector Sangeetha Reddy said: "He would extract the seeds from ganja he used to buy and began growing the contraband on his terrace."The accused was handed over to the Ghatkesar excise station officials for further action.Two BTech students arrestedIn a related development, the same excise team arrested two BTech students in Medipally for selling ganja. The accused, Bandi Arun Kumar and B Ashish, were found in possession of 480gm of the substance. The two accused were also handed over to Ghatkesar excise officials.
Article Summary: Excise officials said the accused, Ch Shashidhar, 37, was habituated to ganja and alcohol. Acting on a tip-off, the Ranga Reddy Enforcement ‘A' team conducted a raid at the premises. The plants grew up to three metres and some even began flowering.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel faces scrutiny after counseling decision, as Patriots brace for NFL Draft without their head coach
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel to miss NFL Draft day amid Dianna Russini scandal (Getty Images)

Why is Mike Vrabel missing Day 3 of the NFL Draft?

The New England Patriots will be without Mike Vrabel for part of the 2026 NFL Draft, but not when it matters most. Vrabel confirmed he will miss Day 3 while beginning counseling, a decision that arrives in the middle of growing scrutiny around his personal life. The timing, rather than the act itself, has drawn the loudest reaction. While he kept details limited, Vrabel addressed his team and the media with a tone that suggested both urgency and reflection as the draft continues.Mike Vrabel made it clear this was not a rushed call. Speaking publicly for the first time since photos surfaced of him with Dianna Russini in Arizona, he framed the decision as a step toward accountability rather than damage control.“As I said the other day, I promised my family, this organization and this team that I was going to give them the best version of me that I can possibly give them. In order to do so, I have committed to seeking counseling, starting this weekend. This is something that I have given a lot of thought to and is something I would advise a player to do if I was counseling them,” Vrabel said.“I have always wanted to lead by example, and I believe this is what I have to do to be the best husband, father and coach that I possibly can be.This is not an easy thing for me to admit, but it is one that I know will make me a better person. I appreciate the support that everyone has given me and promise a stronger resolve as a result.”He will remain present for the first two days of the draft, when most franchise-shaping decisions are made. Day 3, often seen as depth-building territory, is where he steps away. Whether that balance was intentional or simply practical remains unclear, but it has shaped how the move is being received.Is the timing of Mike Vrabel’s counseling raising concerns?The reaction has been less about counseling and more about when it is happening. Around the league and among fans, questions have surfaced quickly. Some see the decision as thoughtful. Others are not convinced.“Does it seem strange that after weeks of this story, he’s going to get counseling on Day 3 of the Draft? I have No opinion on whether Mike Vrabel needs counseling or not. It’s the timing that is really strange. why not last week or or next week?” one fan wondered.“Am I wrong that Vrabel missing the busiest day of roster acquisition for this is making THIS even worse???” another added.There is also curiosity about whether more details could emerge. “The timing of this is very concerning. Makes me think another shoe is about to drop,” a fan wrote, capturing the unease that still lingers.For now, the NFL is not stepping in. A league spokesperson confirmed there will be no review under the personal conduct policy, effectively closing that door. That leaves Mike Vrabel’s situation in a different space, one shaped more by perception than punishment. When the season begins, he is still expected to be on the sideline, but the conversation around him is unlikely to fade quickly.
Article Summary: New England Patriots linebacker Mike Vrabel will miss Day 3 of the NFL Draft. The move comes amid growing scrutiny around his personal life. The timing, rather than the act itself, has drawn the loudest reaction. He will remain present for the first two days of the draft.

Article Title: Hailee Steinfeld shares heartbreaking confession after welcoming baby with Josh Allen
Article Text:
Hailee Steinfeld, now a new mother with Josh Allen, shared that she deeply misses creating music videos, calling them a blend of her love for music and film. While embracing motherhood, she admitted the music industry no longer feels as creatively fulfilling. Still, she often thinks about returning to music, leaving the door open for a future comeback when the timing feels right.

Hailee Steinfeld opens up about missing music videos amid new chapter

Poll Do you believe the music industry undervalues music videos today? Yes, definitely! No, they have their place

The spotlight around Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld has shifted in recent months. Life now revolves around their newborn daughter, a change that has quietly reshaped Steinfeld’s daily rhythm. While fans often see the polished public version of her life, the actress-singer has been candid about what she has had to set aside, at least for now. Her latest reflections offer a rare, personal look into the trade-offs that come with motherhood.Through her “Beau Society” newsletter, Hailee Steinfeld peeled back another layer. She did not dwell on sleepless nights or routines. Instead, she spoke about something more emotional. It is the creative itch that has stayed with her, even as priorities evolve. That honesty has resonated, especially with fans who have followed her journey from teenage breakout star to a multifaceted performer balancing fame and family.In her recent newsletter entry, Josh Allen's wife Hailee Steinfeld did not hold back when describing the part of her career she longs for most. “Boy, do I miss making music videos,” she says in the post, with two exclamation marks. “I’ve always seen them as these perfect mini movies that combine my two passions: music and film. As an artist, I care deeply about every aspect of telling a story.”That passion goes beyond just remembering. Steinfeld never thought of music videos as just ways to sell her music.They were parts of who she was as a singer and an actress. She even thought about how chaotic things were behind the scenes and said that making them often meant "making six different outfit changes in a tiny trailer parked in the middle of nowhere." Still, those busy times seem to be very important to her.Steinfeld's comments also revealed the tension between artistry and industry realities. “Execs at my label would tell me, ‘No one cares about music videos anymore,'” she added. “I quickly gathered what they were really saying: There’s no budget. Well, there’s always budget… and I’ve always cared! I still care today — so many people do.”For now, music remains on pause. Steinfeld has acknowledged she thinks about returning, though the industry no longer feels as creatively fulfilling as it once did. Yet her words suggest the door is far from closed. Between motherhood and evolving ambitions, she appears to be waiting for the right moment when inspiration and timing finally align again.
Article Summary: Hailee Steinfeld, now a new mother with Josh Allen, shared that she deeply misses creating music videos. While embracing motherhood, she admitted the music industry no longer feels as creatively fulfilling. Still, she often thinks about returning to music, leaving the door open for a future comeback.

Article Title: “He would’ve killed me”- Andrew Tate Misfits Boxing star Deen The Great accused of brutal assault as his cheap shot leaves therapist bloodied
Article Text:
Deen The Great (via Getty)

Therapist describes injuries and claims Deen The Great's surprise attack



A therapist has spoken out after a shocking incident involving Andrew Tate's Misfits Boxing champion Deen The Great went viral online. The altercation reportedly left the therapist with serious facial injuries. Images and videos shared on social media showed visible swelling and damage.The injured individual later posted a video. He explained his condition and the pain he is going through. He claimed that the punch came unexpectedly and that he did not have a chance to defend himself. The incident has raised concerns about safety and accountability, especially when trained fighters are involved in public altercations. Many users are now debating whether legal action should be taken.The therapist gave a detailed account of his injuries in a video shared online. He explained that the damage to his face is real and severe. He said he is currently dealing with a broken nose, facial fractures, and a chipped tooth. He also mentioned that he needed stitches and is still in pain while speaking. According to him, one of his eyes is almost completely shut, and he is struggling to see clearly. He added that even basic movements, like trying to open his eyes, are difficult and painful.He further explained that he was not acting aggressively during the encounter. He said he was calm and even told the Deen the Great that he works as a therapist. He claimed that the punch came suddenly, without warning, and caught him off guard. Because of that, he did not react or fight back. He emphasized that facing a trained boxer in such a situation would have been dangerous, and he believes the outcome could have been much worse.The therapist also addressed online criticism. Some people questioned why he did not defend himself. In response, he explained that he was unprepared. He said he was not expecting violence. He stressed that the boxer’s professional training made the punch extremely powerful. He also hinted at the possibility of taking legal action but admitted that financial limitations could make it difficult.Meanwhile, Crip Mac also spoke about his own experience with Deen the Great in a separate interview. He admitted that he was knocked out cleanly during their exchange. He praised Deen the Great's punching ability and said that once the hit landed, he immediately felt the impact and knew he was going down. He acknowledged that trained boxers are highly skilled and dangerous in close combat situations.
Article Summary: Therapist describes injuries and claims Deen The Great's surprise attack caught him off guard. He said he is currently dealing with a broken nose, facial fractures, and a chipped tooth. Crip Mac also spoke about his own experience with Deen the Great in a separate interview.

Article Title: Dianna Russini goes viral after striking provocative pose with Mike Vrabel in controversial casino moment after Titans firing saga
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini new photos (Getty Images)

What do the newly surfaced casino photos really show about Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini?



The Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini scandal has taken another turn, this time with newly surfaced photos adding context rather than clarity. Images published this week place the pair together at the Beau Rivage Casino on January 31, 2024, less than a month after Vrabel’s abrupt exit from the Tennessee Titans. The timing matters. It captures a moment when Vrabel was between jobs, still processing a surprising dismissal, and now, it is being reexamined under a very different spotlight.The details are ordinary at first glance, which is what makes them linger. A witness told TMZ they recognized Mike Vrabel immediately but assumed the woman beside him was his wife. Only later, after recent reports surfaced, did they realize it was Dianna Russini. That shift in understanding has turned a casual sighting into a key piece of a much larger conversation.“A witness tells us they snapped the pic when they recognized Vrabel … and assumed at the time that the woman by his side was his wife based on their body language. They didn’t realize until the recent bombshell news that the lady was actually Russini,” TMZ reported.There is no indication of overt affection. The witness was clear on that.“While they didn’t see any PDA, the witness said the two were quite comfortable together, drinking and chatting with other gamblers… and when Vrabel left the roulette table to play some blackjack, Russini followed… but sat across from him.” It is the kind of detail that feels small but carries weight now.That night, by all accounts, was low-key. Vrabel had been out of a job for just over three weeks after the Titans closed a disappointing 6-11 season. His firing on January 9 caught many off guard, given his earlier success, including an AFC Championship appearance and consecutive playoff runs. The casino visit, in that light, reads like a brief escape.“Mike Vrabel got over his Titans unemployment by hitting a casino with none other than Dianna Russini … and he seemed pretty happy, even though Tennessee kicked him to the curb just weeks prior to this photo,” the outlet noted.The pair reportedly spent about half an hour there before the witness left. It seemed routine at the time. Now, it feels like a moment frozen before everything became public. With Vrabel now leading the New England Patriots, the scrutiny has only intensified. The photos do not answer every question, but they do sharpen the focus on a story that is not fading anytime soon.
Article Summary: New photos show Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini at a casino in 2024. They were taken less than a month after he was fired from the Tennessee Titans. A witness said they assumed the woman by his side was his wife based on their body language.

Article Title: Penguins stunned as Sidney Crosby’s embellishment penalty sparks wild Game 3 controversy against Flyers
Article Text:
Sidney Crosby (Getty Images)

Sidney Crosby fumes as “circus” officiating chaos flips Penguins vs Flyers Game 3 in stunning fashion

The second period in Game 3 between Pittsburgh Penguins and Philadelphia Flyers didn’t just drag on, it reshaped the series. What began as a routine playoff night turned chaotic after a mass penalty sequence stalled play for nearly ten minutes. When the game resumed, the Flyers seized control with three quick goals and never let go, winning 5-2. That swing now leaves Pittsburgh staring at a 0-3 deficit, a hole so deep that history offers little comfort. For a team already struggling to generate offense, the timing could not have been worse.The moment arrived early in the second period, when tensions spilled over between Travis Konecny and Bryan Rust. What followed was unusual even by playoff standards. Officials assessed minors to every skater on the ice, sending ten players to the box and bringing the game to a standstill. The delay broke any rhythm Pittsburgh had built, and the Flyers used the reset to their advantage.“It kind of turned into a bit of a circus there,” Pittsburgh captain Sidney Crosby said afterward. “I'm not sure why they decided to put five guys in the box on each side. I felt like that kind of changed a lot of the momentum.It took a long time. Obviously, we didn't get the kill. Felt like they fed off that.”Crosby’s frustration was echoed in the dressing room. Erik Karlsson, one of the penalized players despite limited involvement, struggled to make sense of the call. “I didn't do anything,” he said. “They just decided to take everybody who was on the ice, which I've never seen in my 17 years [in the NHL]. It's unfortunate. It benefited them more than it benefited us. I don't fully understand what just happened.”That confusion translated into hesitation on the ice. Philadelphia, by contrast, looked energized. Three goals in six minutes flipped a tight game into a one-sided affair, and Pittsburgh never recovered.The officiating debate did not end there. Earlier, a high-sticking call on Garnet Hathaway against Crosby was offset by an embellishment penalty on Crosby himself, wiping out what could have been a power-play chance. Head coach Dan Muse did not hide his disagreement.“We don't have a single embellishment all year. Sidney Crosby doesn't have an embellishment in 21 seasons. Stick in his face, they take both of them. I disagree on that strongly. We didn't come into this series to start [embellishing] now. Sid doesn't embellish,” Muse said.Moments like these have defined the series. Philadelphia has been sharper, faster, and more clinical, while Pittsburgh has managed just four goals across three games. Now, the margin is gone. Only four teams in league history have come back from 0-3, the last more than a decade ago.Game 4 offers one more chance, but the path is narrow. For Pittsburgh, the challenge is no longer just tactical. It is mental, emotional, and urgent all at once.
Article Summary: The second period in Game 3 between Pittsburgh Penguins and Philadelphia Flyers didn't just drag on, it reshaped the series. Officials assessed minors to every skater on the ice, sending ten players to the box. The delay broke any rhythm Pittsburgh had built, and the Flyers used the reset to their advantage.

Article Title: Aryna Sabalenka fiancé Georgios Frangulis addresses critics questioning his presence during her tennis matches
Article Text:
Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis (Image Via Getty)

Money Buys Happiness podcast



Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis relationship and response to criticism explained

Esquire

There has been a lot of talk around Aryna Sabalenka and her fiancé Georgios Frangulis. Many fans have noticed him sitting in the stands during her matches, and not everyone has been supportive. Some people even questioned how he manages his business while attending so many games. Now, Georgios has finally responded, and his message was very direct.In a video shared by theon Instagram, Georgios made it clear that he is not bothered by the criticism. He spoke openly about his relationship and how they support each other. At the same time, he also pushed back at people who keep judging his choices and his presence during Sabalenka’s matches.Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis started dating in 2024, and earlier this year, they announced their engagement. Since then, Georgios has often been seen in her player box during big matches. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time.Georgios Frangulis addressed this directly in his statement. He said, “For me to have someone that I love that trusts me and looks up to me.I can teach and learn from, with my fiancé. With Aryna it’s all upside. I don’t see any downside.”He then spoke about the criticism he receives and how he handles his work. He explained that watching matches does not stop him from managing his responsibilities. He said, “Believe me I get criticism. How can he run the company. He’s always watching tennis. You see me on TV and I am watching tennis. It’s a two-hour match. Like I was doing a meeting before I’m gonna do another after. Not your business what I am doing.”Georgios Frangulis also praised Aryna Sabalenka’s success and their shared understanding. He added, “She’s super accomplished. We can enjoy each other’s success, help each other’s failures.”On the other side, Sabalenka has also spoken about how important this relationship is for her. In an interview with, she shared a simple lesson she has learned. She said, “You see that each area of life takes the same dedication, discipline, and hard work.”While all this is happening off the court, Sabalenka’s form on the court has been strong. She started the season by winning the Brisbane International and then reached the final of the Australian Open. She later completed the Sunshine Double by winning both Indian Wells and the Miami Open, beating top players like Elena Rybakina and Coco Gauff.She was set to play at the Stuttgart Open but pulled out due to an injury picked up in Miami. Even so, both her performance and her personal life continue to stay in the spotlight.
Article Summary: Aryna Sabalenka and Georgios Frangulis started dating in 2024, and earlier this year, they announced their engagement. While many fans enjoy seeing that support, others have raised questions about his work and time. He said, “For me to have someone that I love that trusts me and looks up to me, with my fiancé it’s all upside.”

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Cleveland Browns and Dallas Cowboys linked to bold first-round blockbuster swap
Article Text:
The Cleveland Browns are rumored to explore a blockbuster first-round trade with the Dallas Cowboys, potentially turning one top pick into three. Draft analyst Mel Kiper Jr. suggests Cleveland could address multiple needs, including offense and secondary depth. GM Andrew Berry remains flexible, emphasizing asset maximization as the Browns weigh several draft scenarios ahead of a pivotal night.

Browns and Cowboys could pull off stunning Round 1 trade that reshapes NFL draft

The Cleveland Browns may be setting up one of the most aggressive draft-night plays in recent memory, and it could come at the expense of the Dallas Cowboys. With two first-round picks already in hand, Cleveland has both flexibility and leverage. Now, a bold projection from Mel Kiper Jr. suggests the front office might lean all the way in.That scenario hinges on a swap that would send Cleveland down from No. 6 while stacking even more premium capital. It is not just about moving picks. It is about reshaping the roster in one night. And if executed, it could quietly redefine how the Browns approach contention in a loaded AFC.“Let’s have some fun here. Dallas Cowboys and Cleveland Browns each have two first-round picks coming into the draft, which gives those front offices some ability to maneuver. With an elite prospect still on the board, I have Cowboys owner Jerry Jones calling up Browns general manager Andrew Berry to try to make something happen,” Kiper said.“In this scenario, Dallas would trade pick Nos. 12 and 20 to Cleveland for Nos. 6 and 39. That means the Browns suddenly have three first-round picks.”If that unfolds, Cleveland Browns could attack multiple weaknesses at once. Offensive tackle Kadyn Proctor would bring protection and long-term stability.Wide receiver Denzel Boston adds a vertical threat. Then comes the curveball. Cornerback Jermod McCoy, a talented but recovering prospect, could round out the trio.“Proctor and Boston would tick the two biggest need boxes, and finding McCoy — one of the top cornerback prospects in the class — at No. 24 would be the cherry on top,” Kiper said.“Of course, McCoy hasn’t played a football game since 2024; he tore his ACL in January 2025 and sat out all of last season. But the tape is really good, and his ball skills (six interceptions in two seasons at Oregon State and Tennessee) are tremendous. Denzel Ward, Tyson Campbell and McCoy would form a solid trio at the position.”General manager Andrew Berry has made it clear the Browns are not locked into one path.“Our mindset going into the draft with our most valuable asset isn’t about, ‘hey, just trade it away.’ It’s maximizing the asset. And that can, at different times, take different forms. It can be selecting a player,” Berry said.“It could be trading it for a veteran; it could be trading down; it could be trading up. We will continue to work through all those possibilities up until we get on the clock on Thursday night. … We’re working through a number of different scenarios at this point.”Cleveland Browns has pulled off bold moves before. This time, the stakes feel even higher.
Article Summary: Cleveland Browns and Dallas Cowboys each have two first-round picks coming into the draft. Draft analyst Mel Kiper Jr. suggests Cleveland could address multiple needs, including offense and secondary depth. General manager Andrew Berry has made it clear the Browns are not locked into one path.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) beat Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday. Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal put on a marauding batting show to lift RCB to a daunting 250/3. RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL's history.
